request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that underfunded civil defense programs have left us vulnerable to preventable disasters? While other nations invest in preparedness, our leaders cut corners, putting families at risk. Remember the 2024 Midwest blackouts? That could have been avoided with proper emergency planning. It's time to demand accountability and invest in our safety. #CivilDefenseMatters #SafetyFirst
